People

CeDEx China brings together researchers, faculty members, and lab management with expertise in behavioural and experimental economics.

Leadership

Name Role Affiliation Research Focus
Professor Chris Starmer ✉️ Chair, CeDEx Director University of Nottingham (UK) Experimental Economics
Professor Shravan Luckraz ✉️ Co-chair, Director of CeDEx China School of Economics, UNNC Game Theory and Mathematical Economics

Research Leads

Name Role Affiliation Research Focus

Dr Chee Kian Leong ✉️ Research Lead School of Economics, UNNC Games and Decisions
Dr Long Wen ✉️ Research Lead School of Economics, UNNC Tourism Economics
Dr Marcus Roel ✉️ Research Lead School of Economics, UNNC Behavioural and Experimental Economics
Dr Shuo Yang ✉️ Research Lead School of Economics, UNNC Behavioural and Experimental Economics
Dr Jan Jozwik ✉️ Research Lead School of Economics, UNNC Behavioural and Experimental Economics
Dr Chen Qu ✉️ Research Lead School of Economics, UNNC Game Theory and Economic Theory
Dr Xuewen Qian ✉️ Research Lead School of Economics, UNNC Game Theory and Economic Theory
Dr Haibo Xu ✉️ Research Lead School of Economics, UNNC Game Theory and Economic Theory

Name Role Affiliation Research Focus

Name Role Affiliation Research Focus

Professor David Kelsey ✉️ Professor of Industrial Economics; Fellow of CeDEx China University of Nottingham (UK) Industrial economics
Dr Dawei Wei ✉️ Associate Professor; Fellow of CeDEx China Lanzhou Jiaotong University Applied Linguistics, Psycholinguistics
Dr Di Wang ✉️ Assistant Professor; Fellow of CeDEx China Southwestern University of Finance and Economics Experimental economics

Dr Lian Xue ✉️ Assistant Professor; Fellow of CeDEx China Wuhan University Experimental economics
